case_title: APEX REFRIGERATION VS. PEPPERCORN LLC DBA BODEGA BAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $515.00 FILED BY APEX REFRIGERATION DBA PELCO SALES & SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEPPERCORN LLC DBA BODEGA BAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APEX REFRIGERATION DBA PELCO SALES & SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEPPERCORN LLC DBA BODEGA BAR $515.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL-NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - UNABLE TO FORWARD SENT TO PLAINTIFF
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APEX REFRIGERATION DBA PELCO SALES & SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $90.00 - SERVED SEP-19-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEPPERCORN LLC DBA BODEGA BAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF APEX REFRIGEERATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MS. JEANETTE BARGER, OWNER. DEFENDANT PEPPERCORN LLC DBA BODEGA BAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
